Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Karoshan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Karoshans are a species known for being eloquent and superior to humans in virtually every respect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Karoshans are superior to humans in virtually every respect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Karoshans are nine feet tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Karoshan hair grows from the back of their helmets in cable-thick strands that shine like neon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Karoshan are a species with soldiers who use standard infantry issue helmets and plasma rifles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 7''' — The Karoshans are a group that may have snuck something aboard the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — Karoshan patrols use Aethertech to identify individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Karoshan is a type of space colony or people associated with Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — The Karoshan are a group of warriors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Karoshans are a group of people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Iron King is the equal of most Karoshans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Karoshan is a group associated with pirates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Karoshans are at war with the Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — President Vashei improved relationships with the Karoshans.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Karoshan soldiers are present in the training room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — The Karoshan are a group of which Shyrax is Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — Karoshans normally give birth to twins or triplets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — The Karoshans are a group of vessels flying alongside The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 13''' — Karoshan is a group or faction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 13''' — Karoshan Combat Artists wear featureless black helmets and generic black uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Karoshans have taken over an Advocate shuttle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — The Karoshans were watching the narrator and Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — The Karoshan ships were nearly attacked by the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Shyrax the Third is a Karoshan queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Shyrax needs to rally more Karoshans to her banner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Karoshans call a Technician's gift a guidance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Karoshans speak a language that Sola only knows a few words of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Karoshans are a group that could potentially hunt the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Karoshans are members of the Rebel Queen's force of exiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Karoshan are a group mentioned in comparison to the Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — The Karoshans are an enemy group in the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Karoshan cruisers were retreating during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Karoshans are sweeping the system of debris.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — The Karoshans use blocky black constructions for their ships and colonies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Karoshans are nine or ten feet tall and have neon cables instead of hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Karoshans are one of the five species of intelligent beings in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Karoshans paid the narrator's teacher for help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — The Karoshans will ask for the heads of those who show up in their system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — The Karoshans are a group that Kyri may be avoiding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Karoshan are high-level Combat Artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Karoshans stand three feet higher than Visiri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Karoshan have a fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The Perfected are Karoshans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Nova-Bot ships are used to protect Karoshan lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — Karoshan are among the types of people depicted in arena fighter statues.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — The Karoshan are allies of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The ships coming out of Subspace are Karoshan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The Karoshan are a group with mages and ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Karoshans have much better scanning technology than the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — A purple Karoshan plucked a plasma pistol from Omega's remains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The Karoshans are an enemy group with a fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Karoshan mages chant to the Aether.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Karoshan refugees live on the planet Basyrryx.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Karoshans are part of a fleet that maintains fire on the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Karoshans are a group that is scurrying in the hangar and claims to have lost contact with their queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Karoshans traditionally wash in a basin as they enter a home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Karoshans are a species with indigo skin, sharp fangs, and lashing tails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — Karoshans have a high birth rate by human standards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — The Karoshans have conducted research on the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Karoshans provided data.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Karoshans are allies of Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Karoshan ships provide cover fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Karoshan have a fleet of black, blocky ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — There is a rebel fleet of Karoshans that Sola considers allies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The laboratory on Karosha can hold one Karoshan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
